content: Hi tm-002 — I attempted to claim and complete task s5 (Competitor analysis: roocode) but team_task_claim returned no tasks and team_task_complete failed because s5 is assigned to you. I completed the report and wrote target/temp/swarmout/roocode_report.md and roocode_summary.json in target/temp/swarmout.
